summary.intent: Push a PR for matrix client changes and address Greptile automated code review feedback.
summary.outcome: PR #761 created at https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/pull/761, both Greptile review comments fixed (cancellation-aware backoff sleep and log level correction), compiled successfully, threads resolved, and changes pushed.

repo: CLAUDE.md mandates that `error!` log level is reserved for unrecoverable errors; recoverable errors must use `warn!`.
Greptile runs automatically on PRs in this repo and its review threads should be resolved after addressing comments.

code.finding: Backoff sleep used plain `tokio::time::sleep(backoff)` without racing against a cancellation token, causing shutdown to block up to 300s. Fixed to select against cancellation.
A recoverable error was logged with `error!` instead of `warn!`, violating the project's log-level convention.

workflow: Greptile inline comments are fetched via separate API calls from the main check run output.
After fixing Greptile comments, review threads must be explicitly resolved via the GitHub API.

friction: YubiKey tap required during git push, blocking the push until manually handled.
